description: Event type mapping table. Maps internal event type codes to human-readable event labels. One row per event type. Joined to EVT_IMP_DBF via EVT_MAP_DBF.M_EVT_INTID = EVT_IMP_DBF.M_EVT_INTID.

fields.remark: Internal event type code. Primary join key from EVT_IMP_DBF.M_EVT_INTID.
Human-readable label for the event type (e.g. 'New Trade', 'Early Termination', 'Rate Reset'). This is the primary field for identifying what type of event was performed on a trade.
